---
title: "Activities"
toc: false
---

Most in-class activities for this course are **embedded in the weekly
notes** and worked during class meetings, rather than posted as separate
handouts. The weekly notes are written to be picked up later for review,
so the activity and its worked example stay together with the concept.

Where to look:

- **[Weekly notes](../notes/index.qmd)** — the primary guide; each week's
  activities and worked examples are built into the notes.
- **[Schedule](../schedule.qmd)** — the week-by-week topic map.
- **[Assignments](../assignments/index.qmd)** — the public weekly exit
  tickets, collected in one place.

Any graded or submission-specific activity details — and anything not
posted publicly — are handled in **Blackboard**.
